heading: Reprinting of documents required for sale
label: 1707 Reprinting of documents required for sale
text: The Superintendent of Documents may order reprinted, from time to time, public documents required for sale, subject to the approval of the Secretary or head of the department in which the public document originated. The Revolving Fund shall be reimbursed for the cost of reprints from the moneys received by the Superintendent of Documents from the sale of public documents.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 79 (, No. 11, ).Mar. 28, 190433 Stat. 584
Amendments1990— substituted “The Revolving Fund” for “The appropriation for printing and binding”.Pub. L. 101–520
